CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Comment_AI_Router when the comment classification, substantive determination, or response draft was AI-generated or substantially AI-modified. When true, blocks Resolved status until nepa_human_validated_by__c is populated. Satisfies OMB M-25-21 human-in-the-loop accountability requirement for AI-assisted federal decisions. Source: NAEP/PNNL 2025 AI Workshop three case studies.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: AI generated or modified this classification. Human validation required before resolving.
CustomField.label: AI Generated
